info.title: UCP Shopping Embedded Protocol
info.description:
Embedded Protocol (EP) methods for the UCP shopping service. Methods are sent from Merchant to Host via postMessage using JSON-RPC 2.0. Method prefixes indicate capability scope: ep.{capability} (i.e. ep.checkout). Schema references are logical pointers - actual payload shape is determined by negotiated capabilities.

Embedded Protocol is a client-to-client postMessage interface, so there is no endpoint URL to access this API. Platforms detect merchant support for this protocol based on the presence of `services["dev.ucp.shopping"][transport=embedded]` in discovery responses.

methods.name: ec.ready
methods.description: Initiates the Embedded Checkout Protocol. Merchant declares which delegations it accepts and requests any additional authorization, host responds with optional channel upgrade, auth credential, and initial checkout state.

schema.description: Delegation types the merchant accepts. Must be subset of checkout.embedded.delegations.
Handshake response from host.

upgrade.description: Channel upgrade instructions. If present, switch to provided MessagePort.

port.description: MessagePort for upgraded channel. Runtime type is MessagePort.

credential.description: Requested authorization. Some common examples include API key and OAuth token.

checkout.description: Initial checkout state with host-provided data (saved instruments, addresses).

methods.name: ec.auth
methods.description: Augments Embedded Checkout Protocol by doing auth exchanges per business requirement. Can be used by business to refresh a previously exchanged authorization.

schema.description: Auth response from host containing the requested authorization data.

credential.description: Requested authorization. Some common examples include API key and OAuth token.

methods.name: ec.error
methods.description: Business notifies host that a session-level error, unrelated to the checkout resource, has occurred.

schema.description: Session-level error raised by the business.

methods.name: ec.start
methods.description: Merchant notifies host that checkout UI is visible and ready for interaction. Sent after successful ec.ready handshake.

schema.description: Current checkout state.

methods.name: ec.complete
methods.description: Merchant notifies host that order has been placed successfully.

schema.description: Final checkout state.

methods.name: ec.messages.change
methods.description: Merchant notifies host that checkout.messages has changed. Includes errors, warnings, and info. Host should update UI accordingly.

schema.description: Current checkout state with updated messages or an error response.

methods.name: ec.line_items.change
methods.description: Merchant notifies host that checkout.line_items has changed (item added, removed, quantity updated).

schema.description: Current checkout state with updated line items.

methods.name: ec.buyer.change
methods.description: Merchant notifies host that checkout.buyer has changed (email, phone, address updated).

schema.description: Current checkout state with updated buyer.

methods.name: ec.totals.change
methods.description: Merchant notifies host that checkout.totals has changed. Covers all total line updates including taxes, fees, discounts, and fulfillment costs. For changes that also affect a specific domain (e.g., fulfillment cost update), this message MUST be sent after the domain-specific change message (e.g., ec.fulfillment.change).

schema.description: Current checkout state with updated totals.

methods.name: ec.payment.change
methods.description: Merchant notifies host that checkout.payment has changed (instrument selected, status updated).

schema.description: Current checkout state with updated payment.

methods.name: ec.payment.instruments_change_request
methods.description: Merchant requests host to present payment instrument selection UI for the buyer to change their payment method.

schema.description: Current checkout state.
Checkout state after instrument selection.

checkout.description: Partial checkout update with payment instrument selection.

selected_instrument_id.description: ID of the selected payment instrument.

methods.name: ec.payment.credential_request
methods.description: Merchant requests host to collect payment credential for selected instrument (CVV, 3DS, wallet confirmation).

schema.description: Current checkout state with selected instrument.
Checkout state with payment credential ready for completion.

checkout.description: Partial checkout update with payment credential.

instruments.description: Payment instruments with credential populated on selected instrument.

methods.name: ec.window.open_request
methods.description: The buyer activated a link within checkout. The host MUST present the content to the buyer and respond with a success result, or respond with a window_open_rejected_error error if host policy prevented the navigation.

schema.description: The URL of the resource to present.
Acknowledgement that the host handled the request.

methods.name: ep.cart.ready
methods.description: Initiates the Embedded Cart Protocol. Business declares which delegation it supports and requests any additional authorization, host responds with optional channel upgrade and auth credential.

schema.description: Delegation types the merchant accepts.
Handshake response from host.

upgrade.description: Channel upgrade instructions. If present, switch to provided MessagePort.

port.description: MessagePort for upgraded channel. Runtime type is MessagePort.

credential.description: Requested authorization. Some common examples include API key and OAuth token.

methods.name: ep.cart.auth
methods.description: Augments Embedded Cart Protocol by doing auth exchanges per business requirement. Can be used by business to refresh a previously exchanged authorization.

schema.description: Auth response from host containing the requested authorization data.

credential.description: Requested authorization. Some common examples include API key and OAuth token.

methods.name: ep.cart.error
methods.description: Business notifies host that a session-level error, unrelated to the cart resource, has occurred.

schema.description: Session-level error raised by the business.

methods.name: ep.cart.start
methods.description: Business notifies host that cart UI is visible and ready for interaction.

schema.description: Current cart state.

methods.name: ep.cart.complete
methods.description: Business notifies host that cart building has completed.

schema.description: Final cart state.

methods.name: ep.cart.line_items.change
methods.description: Business notifies host that cart.line_items has changed (item added, removed, quantity updated).

schema.description: Current cart state with updated line items.

methods.name: ep.cart.buyer.change
methods.description: Business notifies host that cart.buyer has changed (email, phone, name updated).

schema.description: Current cart state with updated buyer.

methods.name: ep.cart.messages.change
methods.description: Business notifies host that cart.messages has changed. Includes errors, warnings, and info. Host should update UI accordingly.

schema.description: Current cart state with updated messages or an error response.

type.description: The type of authorization data business is requesting from the host.
